articles.headline: Broadcom expands AI inference and edge portfolio with FuriosaAI partnership and new 5G/Wi‑Fi 8 platform
articles.summary: Broadcom broadened its inference and edge strategy through a FuriosaAI partnership and a combined 5G + Wi‑Fi 8 fixed-wireless platform with Samsung. For businesses, the significance is lower-latency AI infrastructure and faster carrier-grade wireless upgrades that can affect cloud deployment, edge compute planning, and network investment cycles.

articles.headline: Elemental Impact launches data center innovation initiative with Amazon, Google, Meta, and Microsoft
articles.summary: Elemental Impact launched a Data Center Innovation Initiative to accelerate deployment of energy and materials technologies in data center environments. The business impact is that major cloud and infrastructure players are coordinating around power, cooling, and materials constraints, which can influence future data center costs and supply-chain planning.

articles.headline: Foxconn confirms ransomware attack disrupting North American factories
articles.summary: Taiwanese electronics manufacturing giant Foxconn says a cyberattack disrupted operations across multiple North American factories, with the Nitrogen ransomware gang claiming it exfiltrated eight terabytes of data. For businesses, this raises immediate supply-chain and continuity risks, especially for companies depending on electronics manufacturing capacity or just-in-time shipments.
